title: Manchester Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Manchester, with a Z-Score of -3.23. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current weather conditions in Manchester are characterized by a high umidity level of 84% and moderate wind speed of 20.5 km/h.
The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is 12.3 GG, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is 0.0 GG, indicating a high demand for heating.
The cold snap is expected to continue, with temperatures remaining low, further exacerbating the extreme conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap
